extractMetadata.fullName: Integrated Personnel and Pay System - Army
extractMetadata.report: Unit Roster — Personnel and Leave Status Extract
extractMetadata.extractedBy: S1 NCOIC — SFC Garza, Roberto M. / G1 IPPSA Portal
extractMetadata.leavePolicy: DA PAM 600-8-10 — DA Form 31 processed in IPPS-A; leave accrues at 2.5 days/month (30 days/FY); max carryover 60 days; use-or-lose threshold exceeded soldiers must take leave before 30 Sep 2026
extractMetadata.dd93Policy: AR 600-8-1 — DD Form 93 reviewed/updated within 30 days of major life event or every 2 years; commanders verify annually
extractMetadata.sglvPolicy: 38 USC 1967 — SGLV 8286 current; max coverage $400,000; premium $0.06/$1,000/month
extractMetadata.prrPolicy: AR 600-8-104 — Personnel Record Review conducted every 2 years or upon PCS/promotion
extractMetadata.evalPolicy: AR 623-3 — OER/NCOER submitted no later than 60 days after through date; Overdue = submitted after 60-day grace
